title: Sell Locally and Now Into Regional Markets: Temu’s Local Seller Program Explained (2026 Update)
description:
Sponsored content is created on behalf of Digital Commerce 360. Our editorial staff is not involved in the creation of the sponsored content. Temu is a global e-commerce platform that helps businesses reach more customers and grow online. As part of that effort, Temu launched its Local Seller Program to enable eligible local businesses to […]
The post Sell Locally and Now Into Regional Markets: Temu’s Local Seller Program Explained (2026 Update) appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: Temu Expands Local Seller Program to Regional Markets in 2026
summary_ko: Temu가 지역 판매자 프로그램을 확장하여 현지 비즈니스가 더 많은 고객에게 도달할 수 있도록 지원하고 있습니다. 이 프로그램을 통해 적격 지역 비즈니스는 지역 시장뿐만 아니라 더 넓은 지역 시장에서도 판매할 수 있습니다. Temu는 글로벌 전자상거래 플랫폼으로서 비즈니스 성장을 도모하는 역할을 강화하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Temu has expanded its Local Seller Program to help eligible local businesses reach more customers and grow their online presence. The program now enables sellers to access not only local markets but also broader regional markets. Temu continues to strengthen its role as a global e-commerce platform facilitating business growth.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 Temu의 지역화 전략을 참고하여 글로벌 시장에서 현지 판매자 네트워크 구축과 지역별 맞춤형 접근법을 고려해야 합니다.
so_what_en: LG D2C should consider Temu's localization strategy to build regional seller networks and develop market-specific approaches for global expansion.
key_points: Temu launches expanded Local Seller Program for regional market access
Program targets eligible local businesses for growth opportunities
Platform facilitates both local and regional market penetration
one_line_insight_ko: 글로벌 플랫폼의 지역화 전략이 현지 판매자 생태계 확장의 핵심 동력이 되고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Global platform localization strategies are becoming key drivers for expanding regional seller ecosystems.

title: Why Gaming Advertising Belongs on More Ecommerce Media Plans
description:
Sponsor content is created on behalf of and in collaboration with Bazoom by DigitalCommerce360. Our editorial staff is not involved in the creation of the sponsored content. Gaming is not a single advertising channel. Brands treating it as one are leaving a measurable attention opportunity unaddressed. Ecommerce brands have built detailed playbooks for Meta, TikTok, […]
The post Why Gaming Advertising Belongs on More Ecommerce Media Plans appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: Gaming Advertising Emerges as Untapped Channel for Ecommerce Media Plans
summary_ko: 게임 광고는 단일 채널이 아니라 다양한 기회를 제공하는 복합적인 광고 영역입니다. 이커머스 브랜드들이 Meta, TikTok 등에 대한 상세한 플레이북을 구축한 반면, 게임 광고는 여전히 활용도가 낮습니다. 브랜드들이 게임을 단일 채널로 취급함으로써 측정 가능한 어텐션 기회를 놓치고 있습니다.
summary_en: Gaming advertising represents a complex advertising ecosystem rather than a single channel, offering diverse opportunities for brands. While ecommerce brands have developed detailed playbooks for Meta and TikTok, gaming advertising remains underutilized. Brands treating gaming as a single channel are missing measurable attention opportunities.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 게임 광고를 다층적 채널로 접근하여 기존 소셜미디어 플랫폼 중심의 광고 전략을 다각화해야 합니다.
so_what_en: LG D2C should approach gaming advertising as a multi-layered channel to diversify beyond traditional social media-focused advertising strategies.
key_points: Gaming advertising offers untapped opportunities for ecommerce brands
Brands need sophisticated approaches rather than treating gaming as single channel
Measurable attention opportunities exist in gaming ecosystem
one_line_insight_ko: 게임 생태계는 이커머스 브랜드에게 아직 충분히 활용되지 않은 어텐션 기회를 제공합니다.
one_line_insight_en: Gaming ecosystems present underexploited attention opportunities for ecommerce brands seeking media diversification.

title: Retailers are rushing to build AI apps. It’s unclear if shoppers will use them
description: Retailers and brands are launching shopping apps within ChatGPT and Claude at a rapid pace. But whether or not shoppers will embrace them at a rapid pace remains to be seen.
title_en: Retailers Rush to Build AI Shopping Apps Despite Uncertain Consumer Adoption
summary_ko: 소매업체와 브랜드들이 ChatGPT와 Claude 내에서 쇼핑 앱을 빠르게 출시하고 있습니다. 하지만 소비자들이 이러한 앱을 빠르게 수용할지는 불확실한 상황입니다. AI 기반 쇼핑 도구의 공급과 수요 간의 격차가 존재할 가능성이 제기되고 있습니다.
summary_en: Retailers and brands are rapidly launching shopping apps within ChatGPT and Claude platforms. However, whether shoppers will embrace these AI-powered tools at a similar pace remains uncertain. A potential gap exists between the supply of AI shopping solutions and consumer demand for such tools.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 AI 쇼핑 앱 개발 시 소비자 수용성을 신중히 검토하고, 점진적 출시와 사용자 피드백 수집을 통해 리스크를 관리해야 합니다.
so_what_en: LG D2C should carefully evaluate consumer adoption patterns when developing AI shopping apps, managing risk through gradual rollouts and user feedback collection.
key_points: Rapid proliferation of AI shopping apps on ChatGPT and Claude
Consumer adoption rates remain uncertain despite retailer enthusiasm
Supply-demand gap emerging in AI-powered shopping tools
one_line_insight_ko: AI 쇼핑 앱의 기술적 확산과 실제 소비자 수용 사이의 격차가 중요한 전략적 고려사항이 되고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: The gap between AI shopping app proliferation and actual consumer adoption is becoming a critical strategic consideration.

title: Kohl’s delves into AI for gift finding, aiding associates
description: The retailer launched a conversational AI agent to help shoppers find gifts, and is evolving how associates engage with data using the technology.
title_en: Kohl's Deploys AI for Gift Discovery and Associate Support
summary_ko: Kohl's가 쇼핑객의 선물 찾기를 도와주는 대화형 AI 에이전트를 출시했습니다. 이 기술을 통해 매장 직원들이 데이터와 상호작용하는 방식도 진화시키고 있습니다. Google Cloud와의 협력을 통해 AI 기반 고객 서비스와 직원 지원 시스템을 구축하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Kohl's has launched a conversational AI agent to assist shoppers in finding gifts. The retailer is also evolving how associates engage with data using this technology. The initiative involves collaboration with Google Cloud to build AI-powered customer service and employee support systems.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 Kohl's의 사례를 참고하여 AI를 활용한 개인화된 상품 추천과 직원 업무 지원 시스템을 동시에 구축하는 전략을 고려해야 합니다.
so_what_en: LG D2C should consider Kohl's approach of simultaneously building AI-powered personalized product recommendations and employee support systems.
key_points: Conversational AI agent for personalized gift discovery
AI technology enhancing associate data engagement
Google Cloud partnership for AI infrastructure
one_line_insight_ko: AI 에이전트가 고객 경험과 직원 효율성을 동시에 향상시키는 통합 솔루션으로 발전하고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: AI agents are evolving into integrated solutions that simultaneously enhance customer experience and employee efficiency.

title: Wayfair touts market share gains in retail’s toughest category
description: The home goods retailer also posted a healthy Q1 sales increase, but its struggles with profitability continued as net loss barely budged.
title_en: Wayfair Reports Market Share Gains Despite Profitability Challenges
summary_ko: Wayfair가 어려운 홈 카테고리에서 시장 점유율 증가를 기록했다고 발표했습니다. 1분기 매출은 건전한 증가를 보였지만, 순손실이 거의 변화하지 않아 수익성 문제가 지속되고 있습니다. 홈 굿즈 소매업체로서 성장과 수익성 사이의 균형을 찾는 데 어려움을 겪고 있습니다.
summary_en: Wayfair reported market share gains in the challenging home goods category. The company posted healthy Q1 sales increases, but profitability struggles continued with net losses barely improving. The home goods retailer faces ongoing challenges balancing growth with profitability.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 Wayfair의 사례에서 홈 카테고리의 시장 점유율 확대 전략과 수익성 개선 방안을 동시에 검토해야 하는 중요성을 확인할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: LG D2C should examine Wayfair's case to understand the importance of balancing market share expansion strategies with profitability improvement in the home category.
key_points: Market share gains in challenging home goods category
Healthy Q1 sales growth but persistent profitability issues
Ongoing balance between growth and profitability
one_line_insight_ko: 홈 카테고리에서 시장 점유율 성장과 수익성 확보 사이의 전략적 균형이 핵심 과제로 부상하고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Strategic balance between market share growth and profitability in the home category emerges as a critical business challenge.

title: The Backroom: Redefining Pacsun
description: Brieane Olson talks about her book, “Co-created,” and her work as a merchant and now CEO in redefining the retailer for a new generation.
summary_ko: Pacsun CEO Brieane Olson이 자신의 책 'Co-created'와 새로운 세대를 위한 리테일러 재정의 작업에 대해 이야기했습니다. 그녀는 머천트에서 CEO로서의 경험을 공유하며 브랜드 변화 전략을 설명했습니다. 팟캐스트에서 고객과의 협업적 접근 방식의 중요성을 강조했습니다.
summary_en: Pacsun CEO Brieane Olson discussed her book 'Co-created' and her work in redefining the retailer for a new generation. She shared her experiences transitioning from merchant to CEO and explained brand transformation strategies. The podcast emphasized the importance of collaborative approaches with customers.
so_what_ko: 고객과의 협업적 브랜드 구축 접근 방식은 D2C 브랜드에게 중요한 차별화 전략이 될 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: Collaborative brand-building approaches with customers can become a crucial differentiation strategy for D2C brands.
key_points: Pacsun CEO discusses brand redefinition for new generation
Focus on co-created approach with customers
Leadership transition from merchant to CEO perspective
one_line_insight_ko: 고객 협업을 통한 브랜드 재정의가 새로운 세대 타겟팅의 핵심 전략으로 부상하고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Customer collaboration for brand redefinition is emerging as a key strategy for targeting new generations.

title: Amazon’s AWS boosts revenue growth in Q1 milestone
description:
Amazon Web Services (AWS) revenue growth reached 28% year over year during Amazon’s fiscal Q1. That was the segment’s fastest growth rate in 15 quarters — almost four years. It also represented $2 billion quarter-over-quarter growth. AWS has reached a $150 billion annualized revenue run rate, Amazon CEO Jassy said on the merchant’s Q1 earnings […]
The post Amazon’s AWS boosts revenue growth in Q1 milestone appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: Amazon's AWS boosts revenue growth in Q1 milestone
summary_ko: Amazon Web Services(AWS) 매출이 전년 대비 28% 증가하며 15분기 만에 최고 성장률을 기록했습니다. 분기 대비 20억 달러 성장으로 연간 1,500억 달러 수익률에 도달했습니다. Amazon CEO Andy Jassy가 1분기 실적 발표에서 이 성과를 발표했습니다.
summary_en: Amazon Web Services (AWS) revenue grew 28% year-over-year, marking the fastest growth rate in 15 quarters. The segment achieved $2 billion quarter-over-quarter growth, reaching a $150 billion annualized revenue run rate. Amazon CEO Andy Jassy announced this achievement during Q1 earnings.
so_what_ko: AWS의 강력한 성장은 클라우드 기반 D2C 인프라와 AI 서비스에 대한 기업 투자가 급증하고 있음을 시사합니다.
so_what_en: AWS's strong growth indicates surging enterprise investment in cloud-based D2C infrastructure and AI services.
key_points: AWS achieved 28% year-over-year revenue growth
Fastest growth rate in 15 quarters (almost 4 years)
Reached $150 billion annualized revenue run rate
one_line_insight_ko: AWS의 급성장은 클라우드 기반 AI 상거래 인프라에 대한 기업 투자가 폭발적으로 증가하고 있음을 보여줍니다.
one_line_insight_en: AWS's rapid growth demonstrates explosive enterprise investment in cloud-based AI commerce infrastructure.

title: Ecommerce Trends: What Anthropic, OpenAI and Google are each doing in agentic commerce
description:
Throughout 2025 and the early months of 2026, OpenAI and Google have deployed steady trickles of updates to ChatGPT and Gemini’s ecommerce capabilities — even as their large language model (LLM) competitor Anthropic appeared to pursue other priorities with its generative artificial intelligence (AI) model Claude. Then, on April 24, Anthropic published the results of […]
The post Ecommerce Trends: What Anthropic, OpenAI and Google are each doing in agentic commerce appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: Ecommerce Trends: What Anthropic, OpenAI and Google are each doing in agentic commerce
summary_ko: 2025년과 2026년 초 OpenAI와 Google은 ChatGPT와 Gemini의 이커머스 기능을 지속적으로 업데이트했습니다. Anthropic은 다른 우선순위를 추구하는 것처럼 보였으나 4월 24일 중요한 결과를 발표했습니다. 세 AI 기업 모두 에이전틱 커머스 분야에서 서로 다른 접근 방식을 취하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Throughout 2025 and early 2026, OpenAI and Google deployed steady updates to ChatGPT and Gemini's ecommerce capabilities. Anthropic appeared to pursue other priorities with Claude but published significant results on April 24. All three AI companies are taking different approaches in agentic commerce.
so_what_ko: 주요 AI 기업들의 에이전틱 커머스 경쟁이 심화되고 있어 D2C 브랜드는 다양한 AI 쇼핑 에이전트 플랫폼 전략을 준비해야 합니다.
so_what_en: Intensifying agentic commerce competition among major AI companies requires D2C brands to prepare multi-platform AI shopping agent strategies.
key_points: OpenAI and Google continuously updating ecommerce capabilities
Anthropic published significant agentic commerce results
Different approaches emerging in AI shopping agent space
one_line_insight_ko: AI 쇼핑 에이전트 시장에서 빅테크 기업들의 차별화된 접근법이 에이전틱 커머스의 미래를 결정할 것입니다.
one_line_insight_en: Big tech companies' differentiated approaches in AI shopping agents will determine the future of agentic commerce.

title: Meta and Google ad revenues soar thanks to AI, but big picture is blurry
description: Google and Meta both posted impressive advertising growth in Q1, but their paths are diverging on the critical technology front.
title_en: Meta and Google ad revenues soar thanks to AI, but big picture is blurry
summary_ko: Google과 Meta 모두 1분기에 인상적인 광고 성장을 기록했으나 핵심 기술 부문에서는 서로 다른 방향으로 나아가고 있습니다. AI 덕분에 광고 수익이 급증했지만 전체적인 그림은 불분명한 상태입니다. 두 기업의 AI 광고 전략이 분화되고 있는 상황입니다.
summary_en: Google and Meta both posted impressive advertising growth in Q1, but their paths are diverging on the critical technology front. AI contributed to soaring ad revenues, though the big picture remains unclear. The two companies' AI advertising strategies are diverging.
so_what_ko: AI 기반 광고 플랫폼의 급성장은 D2C 브랜드에게 새로운 마케팅 기회를 제공하지만 플랫폼별 전략 차별화가 필요합니다.
so_what_en: Rapid growth of AI-powered advertising platforms offers new marketing opportunities for D2C brands but requires platform-specific strategy differentiation.
key_points: Both Google and Meta achieved impressive Q1 ad growth
AI driving significant revenue increases
Technology strategies diverging between platforms
one_line_insight_ko: AI 광고 플랫폼의 폭발적 성장이 디지털 마케팅 생태계를 재편하고 있지만 플랫폼별 전략적 접근이 필수적입니다.
one_line_insight_en: Explosive growth of AI advertising platforms is reshaping the digital marketing ecosystem, but platform-specific strategic approaches are essential.

title: How Nestlé turns creator content into brand-suitable ads at scale
description: The CPG giant is deploying a new tool from CreatorIQ and CreativeX that identifies and scores creator posts that can work as paid media.
title_en: How Nestlé turns creator content into brand-suitable ads at scale
summary_ko: 네슬레는 CreatorIQ와 CreativeX의 새로운 도구를 활용하여 크리에이터 콘텐츠를 브랜드에 적합한 광고로 대규모 전환하고 있습니다. 이 도구는 유료 미디어로 활용 가능한 크리에이터 포스트를 식별하고 점수화합니다. CPG 대기업이 크리에이터 마케팅을 스케일업하는 혁신적인 접근법을 보여줍니다.
summary_en: Nestlé is deploying a new tool from CreatorIQ and CreativeX that transforms creator content into brand-suitable ads at scale. The tool identifies and scores creator posts that can work as paid media. This shows an innovative approach for CPG giants to scale creator marketing.
so_what_ko: AI 기반 크리에이터 콘텐츠 변환 도구는 D2C 브랜드가 인플루언서 마케팅을 효율적으로 스케일업할 수 있는 새로운 방법을 제시합니다.
so_what_en: AI-powered creator content transformation tools offer D2C brands new ways to efficiently scale influencer marketing.
key_points: Nestlé using AI tools to transform creator content into ads
CreatorIQ and CreativeX collaboration for content scoring
Scalable approach to creator marketing for CPG brands
one_line_insight_ko: AI 기반 크리에이터 콘텐츠 최적화 도구가 브랜드의 인플루언서 마케팅 ROI를 혁신적으로 개선하고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: AI-powered creator content optimization tools are revolutionizing brands' influencer marketing ROI.

title: Claire’s marks next chapter with Gen Alpha-focused ASMR campaign
description: “A Girl SMR at Claire's” includes ASMR set-ups, a Summer Sensory Shop, creator tie-ups and a presence on teen-focused social platform Coverstar.
title_en: Claire's Launches Gen Alpha-Focused ASMR Campaign to Connect with Young Consumers
summary_ko: Claire's가 'A Girl SMR at Claire's' 캠페인으로 Gen Alpha 세대를 타겟한 새로운 마케팅 전략을 선보였습니다. 이 캠페인은 ASMR 콘텐츠, Summer Sensory Shop, 크리에이터 협업, 그리고 틴에이저 전용 소셜 플랫폼 Coverstar를 활용합니다. 감각적 경험과 소셜 미디어를 결합한 혁신적인 접근법으로 차세대 소비자와의 연결을 강화하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Claire's has launched 'A Girl SMR at Claire's' campaign targeting Generation Alpha with innovative sensory marketing. The campaign incorporates ASMR setups, a Summer Sensory Shop, creator partnerships, and presence on teen-focused social platform Coverstar. This represents a strategic shift toward sensory-driven content to engage the next generation of consumers.
so_what_ko: Gen Alpha 세대는 시각적 콘텐츠를 넘어 감각적 경험을 중시하므로, LG D2C 브랜드도 ASMR과 같은 몰입형 콘텐츠 전략을 고려해야 합니다.
so_what_en: As Gen Alpha values sensory experiences beyond visual content, LG D2C brands should consider immersive content strategies like ASMR to connect with this emerging consumer segment.
key_points: Claire's targets Gen Alpha with ASMR-focused sensory marketing campaign
Campaign includes physical Summer Sensory Shop and creator collaborations
Uses teen-focused social platform Coverstar for distribution
Represents evolution from traditional visual marketing to experiential content
one_line_insight_ko: Gen Alpha 세대를 위한 감각적 마케팅이 전통적 시각 중심 콘텐츠를 대체하는 새로운 트렌드로 부상하고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Sensory marketing for Gen Alpha is emerging as a new trend replacing traditional visual-centric content strategies.

title: Carter’s CMO on evolving marketing by pairing heritage with progress
description: The first creative under Global CMO Sarah Crockett captures a universal truth of youth sports: Parents around the world will eventually shout “Wrong goal!”
title_en: Carter's CMO Discusses Balancing Heritage Brand Values with Modern Marketing Innovation
summary_ko: Carter's의 글로벌 CMO Sarah Crockett이 브랜드 헤리티지와 현대적 마케팅 혁신의 균형에 대해 논의했습니다. 새로운 크리에이티브는 청소년 스포츠의 보편적 진실을 담아내며, 전 세계 부모들이 결국 '잘못된 골!'이라고 외치게 된다는 메시지를 전달합니다. 이는 헤리티지 브랜드가 어떻게 현대적 관련성을 유지하면서 전통적 가치를 보존할 수 있는지를 보여줍니다.
summary_en: Carter's Global CMO Sarah Crockett discussed balancing heritage brand values with modern marketing innovation. The first creative under her leadership captures a universal truth of youth sports, showing how parents worldwide will eventually shout 'Wrong goal!' This demonstrates how heritage brands can maintain contemporary relevance while preserving traditional values.
so_what_ko: 헤리티지 브랜드인 LG는 Carter's처럼 전통적 가치를 현대적 마케팅 혁신과 조화시키는 전략이 필요합니다.
so_what_en: As a heritage brand, LG should adopt Carter's approach of harmonizing traditional values with modern marketing innovation.
key_points: Carter's CMO emphasizes balancing heritage with marketing progress
New creative captures universal parenting experiences in youth sports
Strategy focuses on maintaining brand relevance across generations
Demonstrates effective heritage brand modernization approach
one_line_insight_ko: 헤리티지 브랜드의 성공적 현대화는 전통적 가치와 현대적 관련성 간의 균형에서 나옵니다.
one_line_insight_en: Successful modernization of heritage brands comes from balancing traditional values with contemporary relevance.

title: Your marketing automation isn’t broken, it’s overloaded
description:
As workflows pile up, automation systems become harder to trust, slowing campaigns and creating inconsistent results.
The post Your marketing automation isn’t broken, it’s overloaded appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: Marketing Automation Systems Struggle with Workflow Overload and Trust Issues
summary_ko: 마케팅 자동화 시스템이 워크플로우 과부하로 인해 신뢰성 문제에 직면하고 있습니다. 워크플로우가 누적되면서 자동화 시스템이 신뢰하기 어려워지고, 캠페인 속도가 느려지며 일관되지 않은 결과를 생성합니다. 이는 마케팅 자동화의 효율성을 저해하는 주요 원인으로 지적되고 있습니다.
summary_en: Marketing automation systems are facing trust issues due to workflow overload and complexity. As workflows accumulate, automation systems become harder to trust, resulting in slower campaigns and inconsistent results. This represents a major challenge undermining the effectiveness of marketing automation investments.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 마케팅 자동화 시스템의 워크플로우 복잡성을 관리하고 시스템 신뢰성을 높이는 거버넌스 체계를 구축해야 합니다.
so_what_en: LG D2C must establish governance frameworks to manage marketing automation workflow complexity and improve system reliability.
key_points: Marketing automation systems suffering from workflow overload
Complexity leads to decreased trust and campaign effectiveness
Inconsistent results undermining automation ROI
Need for better system management and governance
one_line_insight_ko: 마케팅 자동화의 성공은 기술 도입이 아닌 워크플로우 관리와 시스템 거버넌스에 달려 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Marketing automation success depends on workflow management and system governance, not just technology adoption.

title: AI moved forward, marketing did not
description:
Marketers were early adopters of AI, but while it has evolved most teams are still stuck using it like a smarter autocomplete.
The post AI moved forward, marketing did not appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: Marketing Teams Lag Behind AI Evolution, Still Using It Like Advanced Autocomplete
summary_ko: 마케터들이 AI의 초기 채택자였음에도 불구하고, AI가 발전하는 동안 대부분의 팀은 여전히 AI를 스마트한 자동완성 도구처럼 사용하고 있습니다. AI 기술은 크게 진보했지만 마케팅 팀의 활용 방식은 초기 단계에 머물러 있어 격차가 벌어지고 있습니다. 이는 AI의 진정한 잠재력을 활용하지 못하고 있음을 시사합니다.
summary_en: While marketers were early AI adopters, most teams remain stuck using AI like advanced autocomplete despite significant technological evolution. A growing gap exists between AI capabilities and marketing team utilization methods. This suggests organizations are not leveraging AI's true potential for marketing transformation.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 AI를 단순한 도구가 아닌 전략적 마케팅 파트너로 활용하는 고도화된 접근법을 개발해야 합니다.
so_what_en: LG D2C must develop sophisticated approaches to use AI as a strategic marketing partner, not just a simple tool.
key_points: Marketing teams underutilizing evolved AI capabilities
Gap between AI technological progress and marketing adoption
Most organizations still treat AI as advanced autocomplete
Need for strategic evolution in AI marketing applications
one_line_insight_ko: 마케팅에서 AI의 진정한 가치는 고급 자동완성을 넘어 전략적 파트너십에서 실현됩니다.
one_line_insight_en: AI's true value in marketing is realized through strategic partnership, not advanced autocomplete functionality.

title: Delegated authority is the missing layer in the AI martech stack
description:
Scaling AI without a clear governance layer risks uncoordinated liability. Delegated authority gives your agents the guardrails needed to act with confidence.
The post Delegated authority is the missing layer in the AI martech stack appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: Delegated Authority Emerges as Critical Missing Layer in AI Martech Stack
summary_ko: 명확한 거버넌스 레이어 없이 AI를 확장하는 것은 조정되지 않은 책임 리스크를 야기합니다. 위임된 권한(Delegated Authority)이 AI 에이전트가 확신을 가지고 행동할 수 있는 가드레일을 제공하는 AI 마케팅 기술 스택의 누락된 계층으로 제시되었습니다. 이는 AI 시스템의 안전하고 효과적인 운영을 위한 핵심 요소로 인식되고 있습니다.
summary_en: Scaling AI without clear governance layers creates risks of uncoordinated liability across systems. Delegated authority is proposed as the missing layer in AI martech stacks that provides guardrails for AI agents to act with confidence. This represents a critical component for safe and effective AI system operations.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 AI 에이전트 시스템 도입 시 명확한 권한 위임 체계와 거버넌스 프레임워크를 구축하여 리스크를 관리해야 합니다.
so_what_en: LG D2C must establish clear delegated authority frameworks and governance systems when implementing AI agent technologies to manage risks.
key_points: Delegated authority identified as missing AI martech stack layer
Governance frameworks essential for AI agent confidence and safety
Scaling AI without governance creates liability risks
Need for structured AI agent decision-making protocols
one_line_insight_ko: AI 에이전트의 성공적 도입은 기술력이 아닌 명확한 권한 위임과 거버넌스 체계에 달려 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Successful AI agent implementation depends on clear delegated authority and governance frameworks, not just technical capabilities.
